summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently with no shared canonical. No security-sensitive items were found. Close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths are disabled or unsafe for this job, so the result keeps proof-needed and linked issue work open and escalates only maintainer-owned or active-follow-up PRs that require human judgment.
